name: liquid-lab-contact-form
description: Block-based contact form wired to Shopify's native /contact endpoint via the {% form 'contact' %} Liquid tag. Merchants compose the form themselves from 9 block types: 5 form fields (email_field, text_field, tel_field, textarea_field, select_field), 1 consent checkbox (checkbox_field with richtext label), and 3 info column blocks (info_email, info_phone, info_address). Three layout modes: single column, two-column (info left + form right), two-column-reverse (form left + info right). Per-field width control on desktop (half/full) renders fields in a responsive grid that collapses to single column on mobile. Form supports optional card-style container with bg, border, radius, shadow (§8.4). Pre-fills name + email from logged-in customer. On successful submission renders a success message via form.posted_successfully? with optional 'hide form after success' toggle. On validation errors, renders a focusable role='alert' summary with anchor links to each invalid field, plus per-field aria-invalid + aria-describedby + visible error message. Built on the Liquid Lab spacing v2 system: lab_section + lab_container utilities, spacing_size (none/small/medium/large/custom) and container_width (narrow/boxed/wide/full) settings. Three Dark/Warm/Bold presets ship with default block sets. Shopify-native honeypot (spam protection); zero JavaScript dependencies; WCAG AA compliant.
notes: Complete v2.0.0 rebuild from v1.0.0 (which had hardcoded fields). Now block-based — merchants add only the fields they need. Migrated to Liquid Lab spacing system (lab_section + lab_container).
